2023-06-30T19:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Che Kung Miu Road Roundabout is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-30T19:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，車公廟路迴旋處的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-30T19:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Che Kung Miu Road Roundabout which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-06-30T19:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的車公廟路迴旋處的部份行車線現已解封。

2023-06-30T19:36:00.CONTENT_EN:

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

Due to traffic accident, part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near Provident Centre is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

2023-07-01T08:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Classical Gardens are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2023-07-01T08:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近新峰花園的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2023-07-01T08:35:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Classical Gardens is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

因交通意外，吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近新峰花園的部份行車線仍然封閉。

2023-07-01T10:50:00.CONTENT_EN:

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

2023-07-01T10:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Shouson Hill Road East (both bounds) near Deep Water Bay Road are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2023-07-01T10:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，壽臣山道東(來回方向)近深水灣道的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。
